title: 10 best herbal teas for bruises
description: Echinacea purpurea, also known as purple coneflower, teas helps with bruises because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. It contains compounds like alkylamides, caffeic acid, and chicoric acid, which reduce swelling and promote the healing process. The tea's ability to enhance white blood cell function helps to fight off infection and promote tissue repair. By stimulating collagen production and improving blood flow, Echinacea purpurea tea aids in the recovery of bruis...
